name: Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine powdered sugar and flour; set aside.
3. In another mixing bowl, with mixer at high speed, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, vanilla extract, salt, and almond extract until well mixed.
4. Gradually beat in granulated sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, until dissolved and egg whites form stiff peaks.
5. Do not scrape the sides of the bowl during beating.
6. With a rubber spatula, gently fold in the flour mixture until just combined.
7. Pour batter into an unprepared 10-inch tube pan.
8. Using a metal spatula, cut through the batter to break large air bubbles.
9. Bake for 35 minutes.
